revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
revision.text: #redirect[[en:October 8 (old lunar calendar)]] <noinclude>[[Category:New automatic wikipedia redirects]]</noinclude><includeonly>[[Category:Erroneous transclusions of October 8 (old lunar calendar)]]</includeonly>

'''旧暦10月8日'''は[[旧暦]][[10月 (旧暦)|10月]]の8日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[明暦]]元年（[[1655年]]_月_日） - [[朝鮮通信使]]が[[徳川家綱]]に謁見
== 誕生日 ==
== 忌日 == * [[明和]]元年（[[1764年]]_月_日） - [[徳川宗春]]、7代[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1696年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
{{msg:旧暦360日}} *前日[[10月7日 (旧暦)|10月7日]] 翌日[[10月9日 (旧暦)|10月9日]] - 前月[[9月8日 (旧暦)|9月8日]] 翌月[[11月8日 (旧暦)|11月8日]] *新暦[[10月8日]]
{{msg:stub}}

== 忌日 == * [[明和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1764年]][[11月1日]]） - [[徳川宗春]]<ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（共に名古屋叢書三編）第一巻所収</ref>、7代[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1696年]]） * 明治4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[11月20日]]） - [[安藤信正]]、[[老中]]、陸奥[[磐城平藩]]第5代藩主（* [[1819年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] [[zh:十月初八]] [[en:draft:October 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655年}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}}) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}}) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}}, the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|曹洞宗}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325年}}) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|明和}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春}}<ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696年}}).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}}, {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}}, 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}}).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:明暦元年11月5日]]
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008}}
[[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]] [[Category:Lunar Calendar Days]] [[sn:October 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[Category:Lunar October]] {{citation needed}}
{{citation needed}}

== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}}) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}}, the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|曹洞宗}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325年}}) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).

* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}}, {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}}, 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}}).

revision.text:
[[sn:October 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]][[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] [[zh:十月初八]] [[en:draft:October 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]]{{Lunar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}}. It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}}.
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655年}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}}) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}}) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}}, the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|曹洞宗}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325年}}) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|明和}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春}}<ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696年}}).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}}, {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}}, 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}}).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:明暦1st year11月5日]]
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008}}

== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655年}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}}) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱}}.
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}}) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}}, the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|曹洞宗}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325年}}) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|明和}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春}}<ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696年}}).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}}) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}}, {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}}, 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}}).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:明暦1st year11月5日]]
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008}}

[[sn:October 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] [[zh:十月初八]] [[en:draft:October 8 (Old Lunar Calendar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Old Lunar Calendar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Old Lunar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Old Lunar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655年}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|曹洞宗}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325年}} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696年}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:明暦1st year11月5日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008}}

[[sn:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] [[zh:十月初八]] [[en:draft:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Lunisolar|ja|旧暦|1=Lunisolar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655年}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|曹洞宗}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325年}} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696年}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:明暦1st year11月5日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008}}

[[sn:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] [[zh:十月初八]] [[en:draft:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655年}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|曹洞宗}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325年}} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696年}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[Category:Translated pages]] [[ja:明暦1st year11月5日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008}}

[[sn:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] [[zh:十月初八]] [[en:draft:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655年}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325年}} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696年}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:明暦1st year11月5日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008}}

revision.text:
[[sn:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] [[zh:十月初八]] [[en:draft:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655年}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325年}} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696年}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871年}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:明暦1st year11月5日]] == See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008}}

[[sn:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] [[zh:十月初八]] [[en:draft:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655年}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268年}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325年}} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764年}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696年}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819年}} ).
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] [[zh:十月初八]] [[en:draft:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655th year }} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325th year }} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696年}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==

[[sn:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] [[zh:十月初八]] [[en:draft:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655th year }} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325th year }} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696th year }} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:明暦1st year11月5日]]

[[sn:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] [[zh:十月初八]] [[en:draft:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655th year }} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325th year }} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696th year }} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:明暦1st year11月5日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008}}

[[sn:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] [[zh:十月初八]] [[en:draft:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655th year }} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325th year }} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696th year }} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
[[ja:明暦1st year11月5日]]
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008}}

[[sn:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]] [[ko:음력 10월 8일]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] [[zh:十月初八]] [[en:draft:October 8 (Lunisolar)]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655th year }} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325th year }} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696th year }} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year }} ).

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655th year }} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268th year }} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日}} ) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325th year }} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764th year }} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696th year }} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year }} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year }} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008}}
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]]

[[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使|12=draft|12=draft}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾|12=draft|12=draft}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春|12=draft|12=draft}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|12=draft|12=draft}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中|12=draft|12=draft}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008}}
[[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]]

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft}} .

== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春|12=draft|12=draft}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|12=draft|12=draft}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中|12=draft|12=draft}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使|12=draft|12=draft}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾|12=draft|12=draft}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764th year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春|12=draft|12=draft}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|12=draft|12=draft}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中|12=draft|12=draft}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

revision.text:
[[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:October 8 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 8 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:October 8 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 8 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[Category:Pages to sort]] [[Category:qq]][[de:October 8 (Lunisolar)]][[Category:qq]] [[Category:qq]]{{DEFAULTSORT:October 8 (Lunisolar)}}[[Category:qq]] [[zh-yue:十月初八]] {{Lunisolar October}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=Kannazuki|1=Kannazuki|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|ja|ユリウス暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1268|ja|1268th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 13|ja|11月13日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Keizan Jōkin|ja|瑩山紹瑾|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (+ {{ill|1325|ja|1325th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bunei|ja|文永|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008}}

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|ja|明暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1655|ja|1655th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 5|ja|11月5日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|ja|朝鮮通信使|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|ja|徳川家綱|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} .

== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1764|ja|1764th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 1|ja|11月1日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Munekatsu|ja|徳川宗春|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|ja|尾張藩|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} lord (* {{ill|1696|ja|1696th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji|ja|明治|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|ja|グレゴリオ暦|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|1871|ja|1871st year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} {{ill|November 20|ja|11月20日|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|ja|安藤信正|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , {{ill|Rōjū|ja|老中|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|ja|磐城平藩|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} (* {{ill|1819|ja|1819th year|12=draft|12=draft|12=draft}} ).

I hope this works but this is the most questionable one
getting rid of this category. It is not useful
doing this because it is quite important for standardization in my corrections system

revision.text:
{{旧暦10月}} '''旧暦10月8日'''（きゅうれきじゅうがつようか）は、[[10月 (旧暦)|旧暦10月]]の8日目である。六曜は[[六曜#大安|大安]]である。
== できごと == * [[明暦]]元年（[[グレゴリオ暦]][[1655年]][[11月5日]]） - [[朝鮮通信使]]が[[徳川家綱]]に謁見
== 誕生日 == * [[文永]]5年（ユリウス暦[[1268年]][[11月13日]]） - [[瑩山紹瑾]]、日本の[[曹洞宗]]の第四祖（+ [[1325年]]）（文永元年とする説もある）
== 忌日 == * [[明和]]元年（グレゴリオ暦[[1764年]][[11月1日]]） - [[徳川宗春]]<ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（共に名古屋叢書三編）第一巻所収</ref>、7代[[尾張藩]]主（* [[1696年]]） * 明治4年（グレゴリオ暦[[1871年]][[11月20日]]） - [[安藤信正]]、[[老中]]、陸奥[[磐城平藩]]第5代藩主（* [[1819年]]）
== 記念日・年中行事 ==
== 関連項目 == {{旧暦360日|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008}}
== 脚注 == {{脚注ヘルプ}} {{Reflist}}

revision.comment: Immanuelle moved page [[10月8日 (旧暦)]] to [[October 8 (Lunisolar)]] without leaving a redirect: Bot: merge import

revision.text:
{{Not to be confused with|October 8|qq=October 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Meireki|Meireki]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1655|1655]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ) – The [[:en:Joseon Tongsinsa|Joseon Tongsinsa]] audience with [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunei]] 5 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1268|1268]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – [[:en:Keizan|Keizan Jōkin]] , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōtō Zen|qq=}} (+ [[:en:1325|1325]] ) (Some sources suggest [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunei]] 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa (era)|qq=}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1764|1764]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Munekatsu]] <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th [[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] lord (* [[:en:1696|1696]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ) – [[:en:Andō Nobumasa|Andō Nobumasa]] , [[:en:Rōjū|Rōjū]] , 5th lord of [[:en:Iwakitaira Domain|Iwakitaira Domain]] (* [[:en:1819|1819]] ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008|qq=}}

{{Not to be confused with|October 8|qq=October 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|qq=}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Meireki|Meireki]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1655|1655]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ) – The [[:en:Joseon Tongsinsa|Joseon Tongsinsa]] audience with [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunei]] 5 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1268|1268]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – [[:en:Keizan|Keizan Jōkin]] , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōtō Zen|qq=}} (+ [[:en:1325|1325]] ) (Some sources suggest [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunei]] 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa (era)|qq=}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1764|1764]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Munekatsu]] <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th [[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] lord (* [[:en:1696|1696]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ) – [[:en:Andō Nobumasa|Andō Nobumasa]] , [[:en:Rōjū|Rōjū]] , 5th lord of [[:en:Iwakitaira Domain|Iwakitaira Domain]] (* [[:en:1819|1819]] ).

It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|ja|大安|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|qq=}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Meireki|Meireki]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1655|1655]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ) – The [[:en:Joseon Tongsinsa|Joseon Tongsinsa]] audience with [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunei]] 5 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1268|1268]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – [[:en:Keizan|Keizan Jōkin]] , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōtō Zen|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1325|1325]] ) (Some sources suggest [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunei]] 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa|qq=|qq=draft|qq=draft|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa (era)|qq=|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1764|1764]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Munekatsu]] <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th [[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] lord (* [[:en:1696|1696]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ) – [[:en:Andō Nobumasa|Andō Nobumasa]] , [[:en:Rōjū|Rōjū]] , 5th lord of [[:en:Iwakitaira Domain|Iwakitaira Domain]] (* [[:en:1819|1819]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Meireki|Meireki]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1655|1655]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ) – The [[:en:Joseon Tongsinsa|Joseon Tongsinsa]] audience with [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunei]] 5 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1268|1268]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – [[:en:Keizan|Keizan Jōkin]] , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōtō Zen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1325|1325]] ) (Some sources suggest [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunei]] 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146161}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1764|1764]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Munekatsu]] <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th [[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] lord (* [[:en:1696|1696]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ) – [[:en:Andō Nobumasa|Andō Nobumasa]] , [[:en:Rōjū|Rōjū]] , 5th lord of [[:en:Iwakitaira Domain|Iwakitaira Domain]] (* [[:en:1819|1819]] ).

revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初八]][[zh:十月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840126]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 8|qq=October 8}}[[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]]<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * [[:en:Meireki|Meireki]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1655|1655]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ) – The [[:en:Joseon Tongsinsa|Joseon Tongsinsa]] audience with [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunei]] 5 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1268|1268]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – [[:en:Keizan|Keizan Jōkin]] , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōtō Zen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1325|1325]] ) (Some sources suggest [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunei]] 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146161}} 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1764|1764]] [[:en:November 1|November 1]] ) – [[:en:Tokugawa Muneharu|Tokugawa Munekatsu]] <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th [[:en:Owari Domain|Owari Domain]] lord (* [[:en:1696|1696]] ).
* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ) – [[:en:Andō Nobumasa|Andō Nobumasa]] , [[:en:Rōjū|Rōjū]] , 5th lord of [[:en:Iwakitaira Domain|Iwakitaira Domain]] (* [[:en:1819|1819]] ).
== Commemorations ==
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|10|7|10|9|9|8|11|10|1008|qq=}}

== Births == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunei]] 5 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1268|1268]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – [[:en:Keizan|Keizan Jōkin]] , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōtō Zen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1325|1325]] ) (Some sources suggest [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunei]] 1 instead).

* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ) – [[:en:Andō Nobumasa|Andō Nobumasa]] , [[:en:Rōjū|Rōjū]] , 5th lord of [[:en:Iwakitaira Domain|Iwakitaira Domain]] (* [[:en:1819|1819]] ).

== Events == * [[:en:Meireki|Meireki]] 1 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1655|1655]] [[:en:November 5|November 5]] ) – The [[:en:Joseon Tongsinsa|Joseon Tongsinsa]] audience with [[:en:Tokugawa Ietsuna|Tokugawa Ietsuna]] .
== Births == * [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunei]] 5 ([[:en:Julian calendar|Julian calendar]] [[:en:1268|1268]] [[:en:November 13|November 13]] ) – [[:en:Keizan|Keizan Jōkin]] , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōtō Zen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ [[:en:1325|1325]] ) (Some sources suggest [[:en:Bun'ei|Bunei]] 1 instead).

* [[:en:Meiji era|Meiji era]] 4 ([[:en:Gregorian calendar|Gregorian calendar]] [[:en:1871|1871]] [[:en:November 20|November 20]] ) – [[:en:Andō Nobumasa|Andō Nobumasa]] , [[:en:Rōjū|Rōjū]] , 5th lord of [[:en:Iwakitaira Domain|Iwakitaira Domain]] (* [[:en:1819|1819]] ).

<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初八]][[zh:十月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初八]][[zh:十月初八]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:10 nguŏk 8 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:10月8日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 10월 8일]][[zh-min-nan:10 goe̍h 8 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十月初八]][[zh:十月初八]] {{afc comment|Wikidata entry [[da:d:Q840126]] Wikidata name: 8th day of the 10th month in the Chinese calendar [[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 08:42, 11 June 2025 (UTC)}} {{Not to be confused with|October 8|qq=October 8}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?--> {{afc comment|1=This article as with the other date articles is relatively limited in scope to Japan. Reviewing the translation of this is good and also adding content translated from Chinese and Korean wikipedias will also be good. Both wikipedias are also relatively centered around their own countries for their Lunisolar calendar dates[[User:Immanuelle|Immanuelle]] ([[User talk:Immanuelle|talk]]) 00:16, 28 April 2025 (UTC)}} {{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|WD=Q1192766|lt=Meireki}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1655|en|1655|WD=Q6975|lt=1655}} {{ill|November 5|en|November 5|WD=Q2993|lt=November 5}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|en|Joseon Tongsinsa|WD=Q482690|lt=Joseon Tongsinsa}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|en|Tokugawa Ietsuna|WD=Q323422|lt=Tokugawa Ietsuna}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bunei}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1268|en|1268|WD=Q5520|lt=1268}} {{ill|November 13|en|November 13|WD=Q2984|lt=November 13}} ) – {{ill|Keizan|en|Keizan|WD=Q1615313|lt=Keizan Jōkin}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōtō Zen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ {{ill|1325|en|1325|WD=Q5774|lt=1325}} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bunei}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146161}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1764|en|1764|WD=Q7659|lt=1764}} {{ill|November 1|en|November 1|WD=Q2997|lt=November 1}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Muneharu|en|Tokugawa Muneharu|WD=Q6636871|lt=Tokugawa Munekatsu}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|en|Owari Domain|WD=Q1062072|lt=Owari Domain}} lord (* {{ill|1696|en|1696|WD=Q7699|lt=1696}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871}} {{ill|November 20|en|November 20|WD=Q3024|lt=November 20}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|en|Andō Nobumasa|WD=Q3208958|lt=Andō Nobumasa}} , {{ill|Rōjū|en|Rōjū|WD=Q1196812|lt=Rōjū}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|en|Iwakitaira Domain|WD=Q843782|lt=Iwakitaira Domain}} (* {{ill|1819|en|1819|WD=Q6967|lt=1819}} ).
== Commemorations ==

== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|WD=Q1192766|lt=Meireki}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1655|en|1655|WD=Q6975|lt=1655}} {{ill|November 5|en|November 5|WD=Q2993|lt=November 5}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|en|Joseon Tongsinsa|WD=Q482690|lt=Joseon Tongsinsa}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|en|Tokugawa Ietsuna|WD=Q323422|lt=Tokugawa Ietsuna}} .

{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十月初八|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 10월 8일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar October|qq=}} '''October 8''' is the 8th day of month {{ill|October (Lunisolar)|ja|10月 (旧暦)|lt=October (Kannazuki)|1=Kannazuki|2=ja|3=10月 (旧暦)|1=Kannazuki|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/October (Lunisolar)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kannazuki|comment=enwiki is a redirect}} the 10th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Taian|WD=Q96759844|1=taian}}{{efn|ja|大安|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Taian|1=taian|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1306255}} .
== Events == * {{ill|Meireki|en|Meireki|WD=Q1192766|lt=Meireki|1=Meireki}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1655|en|1655|WD=Q6975|lt=1655|1=1655}} {{ill|November 5|en|November 5|WD=Q2993|lt=November 5|1=November 5}} ) – The {{ill|Joseon Tongsinsa|en|Joseon Tongsinsa|WD=Q482690|lt=Joseon Tongsinsa|1=Joseon Tongsinsa}} audience with {{ill|Tokugawa Ietsuna|en|Tokugawa Ietsuna|WD=Q323422|lt=Tokugawa Ietsuna|1=Tokugawa Ietsuna}} .
== Births == * {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bunei|1=Bun'ei}} 5 ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|WD=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1268|en|1268|WD=Q5520|lt=1268|1=1268}} {{ill|November 13|en|November 13|WD=Q2984|lt=November 13|1=November 13}} ) – {{ill|Keizan|en|Keizan|WD=Q1615313|lt=Keizan Jōkin|1=Keizan}} , the fourth patriarch of Japanese {{ill|Sōtō Zen|ja|Sōtō Zen|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sōtō Zen|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (+ {{ill|1325|en|1325|WD=Q5774|lt=1325|1=1325}} ) (Some sources suggest {{ill|Bun'ei|en|Bun'ei|WD=Q1010103|lt=Bunei|1=Bun'ei}} 1 instead).
== Deaths == * {{ill|Meiwa (era)|ja|Meiwa|1=Meiwa|2=ja|3=明和|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Meiwa (era)|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q1146161}} 1 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1764|en|1764|WD=Q7659|lt=1764|1=1764}} {{ill|November 1|en|November 1|WD=Q2997|lt=November 1|1=November 1}} ) – {{ill|Tokugawa Muneharu|en|Tokugawa Muneharu|WD=Q6636871|lt=Tokugawa Munekatsu|1=Tokugawa Muneharu}} <ref>『御系譜』『系譜』（both included in 名古屋叢書三編 第一巻）</ref>, 7th {{ill|Owari Domain|en|Owari Domain|WD=Q1062072|lt=Owari Domain|1=Owari Domain}} lord (* {{ill|1696|en|1696|WD=Q7699|lt=1696|1=1696}} ).
* {{ill|Meiji era|en|Meiji era|WD=Q3125096|lt=Meiji era|1=Meiji era}} 4 ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|WD=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1871|en|1871|WD=Q7746|lt=1871|1=1871}} {{ill|November 20|en|November 20|WD=Q3024|lt=November 20|1=November 20}} ) – {{ill|Andō Nobumasa|en|Andō Nobumasa|WD=Q3208958|lt=Andō Nobumasa|1=Andō Nobumasa}} , {{ill|Rōjū|en|Rōjū|WD=Q1196812|lt=Rōjū|1=Rōjū}} , 5th lord of {{ill|Iwakitaira Domain|en|Iwakitaira Domain|WD=Q843782|lt=Iwakitaira Domain|1=Iwakitaira Domain}} (* {{ill|1819|en|1819|WD=Q6967|lt=1819|1=1819}} ).
